name: AAPT21KaryotypeSchedule
title: AAP T21 Karyotype Confirmation Schedule
description: Karyotype analysis to confirm a Down syndrome diagnosis per AAP guidelines. Should be performed prenatally where possible; if no prior karyotype result of any kind (full trisomy 21, translocation, or mosaic) is recorded, a single karyotype analysis should be performed at any point from the prenatal period through age 21.

action.title: Confirmatory Karyotype Analysis
action.description: Order a karyotype analysis if no prior karyotype result of any kind is recorded.

expression.description: Applies when no prior karyotype Observation (LOINC 29770-5) with any documented result (valueCodeableConcept) is recorded. Any resulted karyotype — full trisomy 21, translocation, or mosaic — suppresses re-ordering of a confirmatory karyotype.
